---
title: "Data Quality Check Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
      
params: 
  Stat_Outlier: NA

---
  
## Summary
```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

N <- length(Stat_Outlier)
l_outlier <- Stat_Outlier[sapply(Stat_Outlier, function(x) x$iqr_indicator == TRUE)]
n <- length(l_outlier)
summary <- dplyr::tibble(
    Params     = c("Number of variable have been checked", "Variable has outlier detected" ),
    Value   = c(N, n)
    ) 
summary %>% gt::gt()  %>% gt::tab_options(
      column_labels.hidden = TRUE
    )

```
## Explore Outlier 

<!-- ```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'} -->
<!-- l_outlier <- Stat_Outlier[sapply(Stat_Outlier, function(x) x$iqr_indicator == TRUE)] -->

<!-- for(i in seq_along(l_outlier)  ){ -->
<!--   print(htmltools::h3(l_outlier[[i]]$DataField)) -->

<!--   # boxplot -->
<!--   df <- l_outlier[[i]]$iqr_df         -->
<!--   field <- l_outlier[[i]]$DataField  -->

<!--   plot <-boxplot( x = df[[3]],  main = "Outlier based on IQR",  col = "lightblue", border = "darkblue" -->
<!--   ) -->



<!-- } -->


<!-- ``` -->

```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis', fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
# 筛选异常值数据
l_outlier <- Stat_Outlier[sapply(Stat_Outlier, function(x) x$iqr_indicator == TRUE)]

# 循环渲染每个字段
for(i in seq_along(l_outlier)){
  # 提取数据
  df <- l_outlier[[i]]$iqr_df        
  field <- l_outlier[[i]]$DataField 
  
  # 输出标题
  cat(htmltools::h3(field) %>% as.character())
  
# 核心：分栏布局（左表右图，等高+滚动条）
cat('<div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: stretch; width: 100%;">')

# 左侧：带滚动条的数据表格（与右侧等高）
cat('<div style="flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 300px; border: 1px solid #eee; padding: 10px;">')
cat("<strong>Abormal Data：</strong><br>")
print(knitr::kable(df %>% dplyr::filter(iqr_outlier == TRUE), format = "html", table.attr = 'style="width:100%;"'))
cat('</div>')

# 右侧：箱线图（与左侧等高）
cat('<div style="flex: 1; max-height: 450px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">')
boxplot(
  x = df[[3]],  
  main = "Outlier based on IQR",  
  col = "lightblue", 
  border = "darkblue"
)
cat('</div>')  

# 关闭分栏
cat('</div><br><hr><br>')
}
